overview.description: AI pre-screening and interview automation for high-volume hiring
overview.description_long: Talentiqa (operating as mind the gap s.r.o.) builds AI-powered HR tech products for high-volume recruitment. Their core product, 'Ella', is a virtual AI assistant that automates candidate pre-screening, interview scheduling, and scoring — eliminating the need for CVs and reducing time-to-shortlist. Designed for blue-collar and entry-level hiring at scale, Ella works across retail, logistics, telecom, finance, and recruitment agencies. Founded in Prague in January 2021, they serve Fortune 100 companies and claim €2M in annual net cost savings and 400% ROI for clients.
overview.tagline: Meet Ella, your AI pre-screening superpower

history.origin_story: Founded as mind the gap s.r.o. in Prague (January 13, 2021), building AI tools to automate high-volume recruitment pre-screening under the Talentiqa brand.

key_milestones.event: Incorporated as mind the gap s.r.o. in Prague (Jan 13, 2021)
Launched Talentiqa brand and Ella AI pre-screening product
Clients include Fortune 100 companies; Manpower Group case study published showing 400% ROI

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Talentiqa's value lies in conversational AI screening workflows with ATS integrations and domain-specific scoring logic. While general LLMs could replicate basic chat-screening, their vertical focus on high-volume blue-collar hiring, pre-built ATS integrations, and compliance tooling provides meaningful differentiation and switching costs.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: High-volume recruitment automation is a growing, proven market with real paying customers including Fortune 100 companies. Clients like New Yorker, Geis Global, and Manpower Group represent strong PMF validation across retail, logistics, and recruitment verticals.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known external funding found; appears bootstrapped or early-stage. However, the company has paying enterprise clients and claims €2M in client cost savings which signals revenue generation. Runway is unclear without funding disclosure.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: A bootstrapped HR-tech startup with real enterprise customers and a clear niche (high-volume blue-collar pre-screening), but vulnerable to commoditization as general-purpose AI assistants increasingly offer similar capabilities. ATS integrations and compliance features provide defensibility, but the company remains small and unfunded.

metadata.notes: Legal entity is 'mind the gap s.r.o.' (IČO: 09821074, VAT: CZ09821074), registered Jan 13, 2021. Brand marketed as Talentiqa / TALENTIQA PRE-SCREENING. Calendly contact suggests 'Romana' is a key team member. Address: Na Beránce 57/2, Dejvice, 160 00 Praha 6.
